summary: Full testing of AZ Distribution Invoice Manager - backend APIs and frontend UI. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend flows verified: invoice creation, edit, delete, customer CRUD, product CRUD, dark mode, A4 preview, search/filter.

ui_bugs.issue: Nested anchor tags: wouter <Link> component wraps an <a> element creating invalid HTML <a><a>. This causes Playwright click timeouts ('intercepts pointer events') and may cause accessibility issues. Each nav link appears duplicated in DOM.

issues: Date picker uses browser's native date input (mm/dd/yyyy) instead of a custom picker - this is acceptable but inconsistent with shadcn UI style

action_items: Fix nested anchor tags in layout.jsx: change to or just use Link without nested (wouter v3 Link renders as directly)
critical_code_review_comments: layout.jsx line 71-86: <Link key={href} href={href}><a ...> creates nested <a> tags - wouter's Link already renders as <a>, so wrapping with another <a> is invalid HTML. Fix: use <Link href={href} className={...} data-testid={...} onClick={...}> directly without inner <a>

success_rate.frontend: 95% - all critical flows work, one minor layout bug with nested anchors

seed_data_creation: 3 customers (Shoaib Hardware Store, Ali Electronics, Bilal Traders) and 5 products (Wall Paint 10L, Paint Brush Set, Masking Tape, Roller Set, Paint Thinner 5L) seeded via backend startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is fully functional. Backend 100% passing. Frontend flows all verified. The only issue is nested <a> tags in sidebar nav (layout.jsx) which causes Playwright click failures but works visually in browser. Use direct URL navigation (page.goto) when testing pages. Invoice number format is AZ-YYMM-NNN (e.g. AZ-2605-001). Customer name is required to save invoice.
rca_of_issue: Nested anchor tags in layout.jsx: wouter's renders as by default, but the implementation also wraps it in another element. This creates .... In Playwright, when trying to click the inner , the outer is detected as the intercepting element. Fix: remove the inner wrapper and apply classes/attributes directly to .
